title: ultraplan --harness team-design (Stage-2 judge output → materializer input)
description: The judge emits ONLY this JSON. scripts/materialize_team.py is the sole disk writer (model never free-writes files). Validation is authoritative: it enforces the codex ban (R1) and the mandatory guard-reviewer (R2/R3) by construction — spec 019 FR-4/FR-5/FR-7.

pattern.description: R5: must be one of the 6 absorbed patterns (references/patterns.json).

model_pin.description: R1: executor pool ONLY. gpt-5.5/gpt/codex are NOT valid values — schema rejects them. opus is audit-only (not a worker, not in this enum).

routing.description: task_type -> agent name, per the chosen pattern's routing_rule.

guard_topology.description: R2: every producer agent MUST appear here, mapped to the reviewer agent(s) that gate it. R3: at least one reviewer's skills must include all of clean-code-guard, test-guard, docs-guard. Enforced in materialize_team.py beyond what JSON Schema can express.
